finding: README omits the show config family and the --show-config diagnostic-flags row is stale (no deprecation note).
proposed_action: Add show config family to README CLI section; mark --show-config deprecated.

finding: docs/manifest.md types config.source_files as list[string]; schema emits array of {path, hash} objects.
proposed_action: Fix doc type to list[object] {path, hash?}.

finding: Precedence table presents .config/pubrun/config.toml as a separate tier from .pubrun.toml; resolver merges both into one local layer.
proposed_action: Reword table so the two local files are one tier (.pubrun.toml wins).

finding: Schema packages_section.mode enum omits imported-transitive, which code supports and docs document; a run using it fails the schema conformance gate.
proposed_action: Add imported-transitive to schema enum + complete default.toml comment + conformance test; validate on CI matrix.
